hero.subtitle: VendorHub is a digital platform that simplifies IT vendor search and selection. Automate your procurement process and save up to 60% of time on finding contractors.

features.title: Why Choose VendorHub
features.subtitle: All the tools for effective IT vendor collaboration in one place

search.title: Smart Vendor Search
search.description: Algorithms automatically match suitable vendors based on your requirements, tech stack, and project budget.

briefs.title: Standardized Briefs
briefs.description: Create detailed project briefs in minutes using ready-made templates. All requirements are structured and clear for vendors.

compare.title: Proposal Comparison
compare.description: Compare vendor proposals in a single interface. Evaluate technical solutions, timelines, and costs.

verified.title: Verified Profiles
verified.description: All vendors are verified. Browse portfolios, client reviews, and ratings before making a decision.

communication.title: Unified Communication
communication.description: All correspondence, documents, and interaction history with vendors is stored in one place.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Track key metrics: project closure time, budgets, and vendor performance.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple process from posting a project to choosing a contractor

step1.title: Describe Your Project
step1.description: Fill out a project brief with goals, requirements, budget, and timeline. Our builder helps you cover everything.

step2.title: Receive Proposals
step2.description: Matching vendors will be notified about your project and will submit their commercial proposals.

step3.title: Choose a Contractor
step3.description: Compare proposals, review portfolios and feedback. Contact finalists and select the best partner.

audience.title: Who Is VendorHub For
audience.subtitle: Our platform is built for two types of users

forCompanies.title: For Companies
items: Fast IT vendor search for any task
Access to a network of verified contractors
Reduce the risk of choosing the wrong vendor

forVendors.title: For IT Vendors
items: New clients and projects in your specialty
Increase brand awareness in the market

clients.title: Trusted By
clients.subtitle: Leading companies choose us to find IT vendors

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join companies that have already optimized their IT vendor search

footer.description: A digital platform for effective IT vendor collaboration. We simplify the process of finding and selecting technology partners.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create an account to get started

company.label: Hire a business partner
company.description: I want to find and hire a provider to help our company achieve our goals.

vendor.label: Get listed on the platform
vendor.description: I want to sell my business' services and boost visibility for my brand.

underConstruction.title: That page is under construction
underConstruction.description: We are working hard to bring you this feature soon.

projects.buildBrief: Build a project brief in minutes

getMatched.title: Get Matched
